prompt: A cinematic, ultra-detailed noir-style scene of 7 anthropomorphic domestic cats gathered around a round green felt poker table in a dim, smoky backroom bar. The central cat is the boss: a serious tabby wearing a dark pinstripe suit, white shirt, tie, black fedora, and black sunglasses, calmly smoking a thick cigar with dramatic smoke curling upward into the overhead lamp. Around him sit 6 other cats, each holding playing cards and dressed like underworld gamblers: on the far left a gray tabby in a textured flat cap and round dark sunglasses; next a ginger cat in a dark fedora, chunky gold chain, and dark glasses; to the right of center a fluffy gray cat in a brown fedora; further right a white-and-tabby cat in a dark New York Yankees baseball cap and pendant necklace; in the near right foreground a striped cat in a fedora and sunglasses seen in profile; all styled as mobsters. The table is crowded with exact poker details: 7 cats total, each with cards in paw, multiple stacks of red, blue, white, and black poker chips, scattered US dollar bills, a short whiskey glass in the front right, and 5 community cards face up in the middle. Use warm amber overhead lighting from a single large hanging lamp, deep shadows, richly textured fur, realistic whiskers, reflective sunglasses, and dense atmospheric cigar smoke. Background should be a dark wood-paneled gambling den with framed vintage posters and signs including a large poker poster on the left and an "ALL IN OR FOLD" sign on the right, plus bottles on shelves. Composition is eye-level and slightly wide-angle, centered on the smoking cat, with a gritty, luxurious gangster mood, photorealistic, dramatic depth, high contrast, and filmic color grading.
translatedPrompt: 一个电影级、超细节的黑色电影风格场景，7 只拟人化的家猫围坐在圆形的绿色毛毡扑克桌旁，身处昏暗且烟雾缭绕的地下酒吧。中间的猫是老大：一只表情严肃的虎斑猫，身穿深色细条纹西装、白衬衫、系着领带，戴着黑色软呢帽和黑色墨镜，正从容地抽着一支粗雪茄，戏剧性的烟雾向上缭绕至头顶的灯具。周围坐着另外 6 只猫，它们都手持扑克牌，打扮得像黑社会赌徒：最左边是一只戴着质感鸭舌帽和圆形墨镜的灰虎斑猫；旁边是一只戴着深色软呢帽、粗金链和墨镜的姜黄色猫；中心右侧是一只戴着棕色软呢帽的毛茸茸灰猫；再往右是一只戴着深色纽约洋基队棒球帽和吊坠项链的白虎斑猫；右前方近处是一只戴着软呢帽和墨镜的侧身条纹猫；所有猫都呈现出黑帮造型。桌上堆满了精确的扑克细节：总共 7 只猫，每只猫爪中都拿着牌，桌上有成堆的红、蓝、白、黑筹码，散落的美元钞票，右前方放着一个威士忌酒杯，中间面朝上摆放着 5 张公共牌。使用来自上方单盏大吊灯的温暖琥珀色灯光，营造出深邃的阴影、质感丰富的毛发、逼真的胡须、反光的墨镜以及浓郁的雪茄烟雾氛围。背景应为一个深色木镶板的赌博窝点，墙上挂着复古海报和标志，包括左侧的一张大型扑克海报和右侧写有“ALL IN OR FOLD”的标牌，架子上还摆放着酒瓶。构图为平视视角且略带广角，以抽雪茄的猫为中心，营造出粗粝而奢华的黑帮氛围，具有照片级真实感、戏剧性的景深、高对比度以及电影级的色彩分级。

breakdown.creativeCore: 黑帮猫咪打扑克：一个电影级超写实提示词，用于创作七只黑帮猫咪在昏暗地下牌室打扑克的黑色电影风格场景。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面
